title: Delete Cluster
content:
# Delete Cluster

Permanently delete an existing Cluster and its Nodes. This will also delete Workloads, Bridges and Services residing on the Cluster. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /orchestration/clusters/{cluster_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.orchestration.deleteOrchestrationClusters()
print(response)

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: Cluster key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
